div.t: ✔ Good Standing — project is performing well with strong resolution rates.
⚠ Needs Attention — moderate issues detected, review SLA breaches and open backlog.
✘ Critical — significant unresolved tickets or SLA breaches require immediate action.

tr.td: No agents assigned to this project yet.

div.t-att-style: 'width:' + str(sla_rate) + '%; background:' + ('#2ecc71' if sla_rate >= 80 else '#f39c12' if sla_rate >= 60 else '#e74c3c') + ';'

t.t-value: resolved.sorted(key=lambda t: t.resolved_date or t.create_date, reverse=True)[:20]

div.div: System-wide overview · Last days · All projects & focal persons

div.t-att-style: 'width:' + str(p['health_score']) + '%; background:' + ('#2ecc71' if p['health'] == 'green' else '#f39c12' if p['health'] == 'amber' else '#e74c3c') + ';'
'width:' + str(fp['resolve_rate']) + '%; background:' + ('#2ecc71' if fp['resolve_rate'] >= 80 else '#f39c12' if fp['resolve_rate'] >= 60 else '#e74c3c') + ';'
